Affordable, relatable merchandise that mirrors local markets has helped us connect with internet users and serve customers across urban, semi-urban, and rural India. Our unique business model and continuous innovation have established us as a part of India’s e-commerce ecosystem.
Culture and Total Rewards
Our focus is on cultivating a dynamic workplace characterized by high impact and performance excellence. We prioritize a people-centric culture, dedicated to hiring and developing exceptional talent.
Total rewards at Meesho comprise a comprehensive set of elements — monetary, non-monetary, tangible, and intangible. Our 9 guiding principles, or "Mantras," are the backbone of how we operate, influencing everything from recognition and evaluation to growth discussions. description:
About the team

Meesho AI Services (MAS) is a new-age AI Services business built to deliver outcomes, not software, for enterprise and mid-market clients. We are in a 0-1 build phase, shaping our go-to-market motion, pricing models, and sales organization from the ground up. The GTM Engineer will be a foundational hire supporting this effort, working closely with the Sales & GTM Leader to build out the top-of-funnel engine.

About the role

The GTM Engineer will own the technical and execution layer of the sales funnel, from automated lead generation to client-facing demo calls. This role requires someone who can build systems and also get on calls to explain MAS clearly to prospective clients. You will work in an environment without an existing playbook, and will help build one.

lists.content:
Demand Generation & Pipeline Building

  • Design, build, and manage automated lead generation systems to create a consistent, qualified pipeline.

  • Execute outbound motions including cold calling, cold emailing, and account-based prospecting.

  • Map client org structures to identify decision-makers, influencers, and blockers within target accounts.

  • Partner with the GTM Leader on MQL to SQL conversion strategy and ICP refinement.


    • Client Conversations & Demos

  • Conduct discovery calls with prospective clients to understand their business problems and buying journey.

  • Lead product demonstration calls, clearly explaining MAS and its value proposition to prospective clients.

  • Continuously improve demos, what is shown, how it is shown, and why it works, based on call feedback.

  • Surface product and service gaps identified through customer conversations to the GTM Leader.

    • Systems & Reporting

  • Build and optimize automation workflows and tools to improve lead quality and reduce manual effort.

  • Track and report on funnel metrics, including lead volume, conversion rates, and call outcomes.

  • Maintain accurate records of all prospect interactions in the CRM.

  • Operate without a fixed playbook, and help build structured, repeatable sales motions as the function scales.

• 2-3 years of relevant experience in GTM, business development, sales engineering, growth, or a related function.

  • Hands-on experience with automation tools and/or scripting (e.g., Python, Zapier, n8n, Clay, or similar platforms).

  • Strong comfort with cold outreach, calls, emails, and LinkedIn.

  • Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain a technical or AI-led product to a non-technical audience.

  • Demonstrated experience in client-facing roles, including conducting calls or presentations.

  • Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, ambiguous, early-stage environment without an established playbook.

  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to track and act on performance metrics.

    • Preferred Qualifications

  • Prior experience selling or demonstrating a technical or AI-based product.

  • Experience building lead generation systems or sales automation workflows from the ground up.

  • Exposure to consultative or solution selling rather than purely transactional sales.

  • Prior experience in a high-growth or 0-1 environment.

descriptionPlain:
About the Team
ValMo is Meesho’s logistics and supply chain organization, responsible for building India’s most cost-efficient, reliable, and scalable fulfillment network. From first-mile pickup to last-mile delivery and reverse logistics, ValMo powers millions of shipments every month for small businesses across the country.
As we scale, the complexity of our network increases exponentially. ValMo operates at the intersection of technology, operations, and partner ecosystems — where execution precision and systems thinking are critical to prevent cascading (domino) failures across the network.
About the Role
We are looking for a seasoned operations leader to head ValMo Operations at scale. This role requires someone who has led large, distributed networks with high shipment volumes, multiple stakeholders, and tight SLAs.
The ideal candidate brings deep systems thinking — the ability to see interdependencies across first mile, line haul, last mile, and returns — and proactively design processes, governance, and control mechanisms that prevent large-scale operational disruptions.
You will be responsible for building a resilient, scalable, and cost-efficient operations engine while balancing growth, service quality, and profitability.
description:
About the Team

ValMo is Meesho’s logistics and supply chain organization, responsible for building India’s most cost-efficient, reliable, and scalable fulfillment network. From first-mile pickup to last-mile delivery and reverse logistics, ValMo powers millions of shipments every month for small businesses across the country.

As we scale, the complexity of our network increases exponentially. ValMo operates at the intersection of technology, operations, and partner ecosystems — where execution precision and systems thinking are critical to prevent cascading (domino) failures across the network.

About the Role

We are looking for a seasoned operations leader to head ValMo Operations at scale. This role requires someone who has led large, distributed networks with high shipment volumes, multiple stakeholders, and tight SLAs.

The ideal candidate brings deep systems thinking — the ability to see interdependencies across first mile, line haul, last mile, and returns — and proactively design processes, governance, and control mechanisms that prevent large-scale operational disruptions.

You will be responsible for building a resilient, scalable, and cost-efficient operations engine while balancing growth, service quality, and profitability.

lists.content:
1.  End-to-End Network Ownership

  • Own operational performance across the entire ValMo network (first mile, middle mile, last mile, and reverse logistics).

  • Drive core metrics: SLA adherence, TAT, cost per shipment, RTO, fill rates, NPS, and network utilization.

  • Ensure seamless coordination across regions, hubs, and partners.

    • 2.  Systems Thinking & Risk Prevention

  • Identify structural bottlenecks and hidden interdependencies that can trigger domino failures.

  • Design robust operating cadences, early warning systems, and escalation frameworks.

  • Build contingency planning mechanisms for peak events, disruptions, and network shocks.

    • 3.  Scale & Standardization

  • Institutionalize SOPs, governance models, and performance management frameworks across regions.

  • Drive standardization while enabling flexibility for hyperlocal nuances.

  • Lead automation and tech-driven transformation of operational workflows.

    • 4.  Partner & Stakeholder Leadership

  • Manage strategic 3PL partnerships and drive long-term capability building.

  • Collaborate with Product, Tech, Finance, Category, and CX to align network strategy with business goals.

  • Lead high-stakes cross-functional problem solving during critical incidents.

    • 5.  Cost & Efficiency Optimization

  • Drive structural cost improvements without compromising service quality.

  • Improve network design, capacity planning, and route optimization.

  • Build a culture of continuous improvement and data-driven decision-making.

    • 6.  Team Leadership

  • Build and mentor a strong bench of regional and central operations leaders.

  • Create a culture of accountability, ownership, and operational excellence.

  • Drive leadership development across layers of the organization.

• 12–18+ years of experience in large-scale logistics, supply chain, e-commerce, or operations-led businesses.
  • Proven experience managing high-volume, multi-city operations.
  • Demonstrated systems thinking — ability to anticipate second- and third-order effects.
  • Strong track record of preventing or successfully managing large-scale operational incidents.
  • Experience working with technology-driven operations and automation.
  • Exceptional stakeholder management and crisis leadership skills.
  • Data fluency and comfort with metrics-driven management.
  • MBA or equivalent leadership experience preferred.
    •

descriptionBody:
About the Team

ValMo is Meesho’s logistics and supply chain organization, responsible for building India’s most cost-efficient, reliable, and scalable fulfillment network. From first-mile pickup to last-mile delivery and reverse logistics, ValMo powers millions of shipments every month for small businesses across the country.

As we scale, the complexity of our network increases exponentially. ValMo operates at the intersection of technology, operations, and partner ecosystems — where execution precision and systems thinking are critical to prevent cascading (domino) failures across the network.

About the Role

We are looking for a seasoned operations leader to head ValMo Operations at scale. This role requires someone who has led large, distributed networks with high shipment volumes, multiple stakeholders, and tight SLAs.

The ideal candidate brings deep systems thinking — the ability to see interdependencies across first mile, line haul, last mile, and returns — and proactively design processes, governance, and control mechanisms that prevent large-scale operational disruptions.

You will be responsible for building a resilient, scalable, and cost-efficient operations engine while balancing growth, service quality, and profitability.

additionalPlain:
About us 
Welcome to Meesho, where every story begins with a spark of inspiration and a dash of entrepreneurial spirit. We're not just a platform; we're your partner in turning dreams into realities.
Curious about life at Meesho? Explore our Glassdoor - our people have a lot to say and they've helped us become a loved workplace in India.
Our Mission
Democratising internet commerce for everyone — Meesho (Meri Shop) started with a single idea in mind: to be an e-commerce destination for Indian consumers and to enable small businesses to succeed online.
We provide our sellers with benefits such as zero commission and affordable shipping solutions in the market. Today, sellers nationwide are growing their businesses by tapping into Meesho’s large and diverse customer base, state-of-the-art tech infrastructure, and pan-India logistics network through trusted third-party partners.
Affordable, relatable merchandise that mirrors local markets has helped us connect with internet users and serve customers across urban, semi-urban, and rural India. Our unique business model and continuous innovation have established us as a part of India’s e-commerce ecosystem.
Culture and Total Rewards
Our focus is on cultivating a dynamic workplace characterized by high impact and performance excellence. We prioritize a people-centric culture, dedicated to hiring and developing exceptional talent.
Total rewards at Meesho comprise a comprehensive set of elements — monetary, non-monetary, tangible, and intangible. Our 9 guiding principles, or "Mantras," are the backbone of how we operate, influencing everything from recognition and evaluation to growth discussions. Daily rituals and processes like “Problem First Mindset,” “Listen or Die,” our Internal Mobility Program, Talent Reviews, and Continuous Performance Management embody these principles.
We offer competitive compensation — both cash and equity-based — tailored to job roles, individual experience, and skill, along with employee-centric benefits and a supportive work environment. Our holistic wellness program, MeeCare, includes benefits across physical, mental, financial, and social wellness. This includes extensive medical insurance for employees and their families, wellness initiatives like telehealth, wellness events, and fitness-related perks.
To support work-life balance, we offer generous leave policies, parental support, retirement benefits, and learning and development assistance. Through personalized recognition, gratitude for stretched work, and engaging activities, we promote employee delight at the workplace. Additional benefits such as salary advance support, relocation assistance, and flexible benefit plans further enrich the Meesho experience.
At Meesho, we are committed to creating an inclusive and accessible workplace where every individual can thrive. In compliance with the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016, we uphold the following principles:
Equal Opportunity: We ensure that employment opportunities are never denied on the grounds of disability if the candidate is otherwise competent to perform the job.
Accessible Workplace: Our facilities are designed to be fully accessible, with amenities and assistive devices provided to support differently abled individuals in their work.
Inclusive Hiring Process: We adopt a transparent and non-discriminatory selection process, including providing application forms in alternate formats and offering reasonable accommodations during interviews upon request.
Career Growth: We provide adequate training post-recruitment and pre-promotion, with training materials available in accessible formats to enable equal career progression.
Support & Confidentiality: A dedicated liaison officer/committee addresses concerns and grievances, while maintaining strict confidentiality of disability-related information.
Awareness & Inclusion: We conduct awareness programs to promote a culture of inclusivity across the organization.
Meesho welcomes applicants and employees of all abilities and is dedicated to fostering an environment where differently abled persons can achieve their full potential.
Know more about Meesho here : https://www.meesho.io/

descriptionPlain:
About the Team
 
You’ll be part of the Analytics Team at Meesho. We are trying to revolutionize the way our consumers shop online by experimenting with a video based shopping format. 
 
About the Role
 
As a Lead Business Analyst, you will work on improving the reporting tools, methods, and processes of the team you are assigned to. You will also create and deliver weekly, monthly and quarterly metrics critical for tracking and managing the business.  You will manage numerous requests concurrently and strategically, prioritising them when necessary. 
 
You will actively engage with internal partners throughout the organisation to meet and exceed customer service levels and transport-related KPIs. You will brainstorm simple, scalable solutions to difficult problems, and seamlessly manage projects under your purview. You will maintain excellent relationships with our users – and in fact, advocate for them – while keeping in mind the business goals of your team.

lists.content:
• Create various algorithms for optimizing demand and supply data

  • Give insights to management and help in strategic planning
  • Analyze metrics, key indicators and other available data sources to discover root causes of process defects
  • Support business development and help to create efficient designs and solution processes
  • Determine efficient utilization of resources
  • Research and implement cost reduction opportunities

• B.Tech/M.Tech /MBA in any discipline
  • 4+ years of experience as a Business Analyst
  • Proficiency in Advanced Excel and Advanced SQL (must-have) – Python is Plus
  • Understanding of basic statistics and probability concepts
  • Proven problem-solving skills

descriptionPlain:
About the Team
Financial Services at Meesho is building one of the largest digital lending businesses for Bharat. As we scale to millions of users, the next phase of growth will be defined by how intelligently we manage credit performance across the lifecycle — from underwriting to repayment and recovery.
The DARC (Data Science, Analytics, Risk & Collections) team acts as the decisioning engine for this business — combining data, risk, and systems thinking to drive portfolio outcomes.
About the Role: Credit Portfolio Optimization
This is a high-ownership, high-impact role focused on maximizing portfolio performance post-disbursement.
You will act as the central problem solver for credit performance — identifying where we are losing money across the repayment lifecycle, diagnosing root causes, and designing interventions that improve outcomes at scale.
This is not a collections or operations role.This is a strategy + systems role with direct impact on metrics like NCL, cure rates, cost-to-recovery, and customer lifetime value.
description:
About the Team

Financial Services at Meesho is building one of the largest digital lending businesses for Bharat. As we scale to millions of users, the next phase of growth will be defined by how intelligently we manage credit performance across the lifecycle — from underwriting to repayment and recovery.

The DARC (Data Science, Analytics, Risk & Collections) team acts as the decisioning engine for this business — combining data, risk, and systems thinking to drive portfolio outcomes.

About the Role: Credit Portfolio Optimization

This is a high-ownership, high-impact role focused on maximizing portfolio performance post-disbursement.

You will act as the central problem solver for credit performance — identifying where we are losing money across the repayment lifecycle, diagnosing root causes, and designing interventions that improve outcomes at scale.

This is not a collections or operations role.
This is a strategy + systems role with direct impact on metrics like NCL, cure rates, cost-to-recovery, and customer lifetime value.

lists.content:
• Own portfolio performance problems end-to-end
    Identify leakages across the repayment lifecycle (early delinquency, roll-forwards, low cure, high cost) and define structured problem statements

  • Drive first-principles problem solving
    Break down ambiguous problems into hypotheses, design experiments, and quantify impact

  • Design and test interventions at scale
    Across:

    • Customer segmentation

    • Communication strategies

    • Payment nudges and incentives

    • Policy and product levers

    • Channel mix (digital vs assisted vs agency)

    • Build intelligence layers on top of collections
      Work with DS/Analytics to create:

      • Propensity / payback models

      • Early warning signals

      • Prioritization frameworks

      • Close the loop with risk and product
        Use collections insights to influence:

        • Underwriting strategies

        • Fraud detection

        • Product design decisions

        • Partner with OPS teams to drive execution
          Ensure strategies translate into measurable on-ground impact

        • Drive leadership visibility
          Communicate insights, trade-offs, and outcomes clearly to senior stakeholders

• 3–8 years of experience in consulting, fintech, lending, analytics, or strategy roles

  • Strong first-principles thinking and structured problem solving

  • Ability to operate in ambiguity and independently define problem statements

  • High comfort with data (SQL/Excel/analytics mindset)

  • Clear ownership mindset — ability to drive outcomes, not just analysis

  • Strong business intuition and understanding of customer behaviour

  • Ability to deal with ambiguous problem statements

  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills

descriptionPlain:
About the Team 
 
Our HR team operates as a strategic partner to the business, focused on cultivating a high-performance culture where exceptional talent thrives. Our work is fundamentally guided by the DICE (Democratize Internet Commerce for Everyone) mission, which underpins our approach to all people strategies. Our core mandate centers on two critical pillars: driving world-class Talent Density and continuously elevating Employee Experience. We achieve this by relentlessly attracting, developing, and retaining the highest caliber of professionals, ensuring that every individual contributes significantly to our success. Concurrently, we are committed to shaping an unparalleled employee experience—one defined by transparent communication, meaningful development, and a deeply engaging, inclusive culture. As stewards of the company's most valuable asset—its people—we design, implement, and champion people strategies that directly translate into sustained business growth and a position as one of India’s most sought-after e-commerce destinations.
 
About the Role
 
We are looking for a seasoned HR Business Partner to lead & manage the 3P / Contract Workforce across multiple Teams and locations. This role will act as the primary HRBP for all third-party employees, driving workforce governance, employee relations, compliance, & productivity in close partnership with Operations. The incumbent will manage a team of 4 HRBPs and work closely with Staffing Partners, TA, HR Ops, Legal, and Business managers to ensure seamless lifecycle management, strong compliance discipline, and a high-performance field workforce. This is a highly field-intensive role requiring strong stakeholder management, ER expertise, data-driven decision-making, & the ability to handle escalations with maturity & speed.

lists.content:
• Workforce Planning & Hiring
  • Partner with Business Manager and Biz finance teams on manpower planning & workforce budgeting.
  • Maintain visibility on headcount status, vacancies, redeployments, & attrition trends across Teams.
  • Coordinate with staffing vendors and TA to support hiring for 3P roles & ensure timely fulfillment.
    •  
  • Onboarding & Documentation
  • Oversee onboarding processes including documentation, BGV, contract issuance, & HRMS updates.
  • Ensure statutory compliance, minimum wages adherence, & labour law norms during employee onboarding.
  • Coordinate contract renewals and maintain complete lifecycle documentation.
  • Attendance, Payroll & Workforce Governance
  • Validate payroll inputs, leave records, and attendance data in partnership with vendors & HR Ops.
  • Conduct regular audits to ensure compliance, documentation accuracy, & audit readiness.
  • Track productivity, attendance discipline, and overall workforce hygiene across Teams.
    •  
  • Employee Experience & Engagement
  • Conduct regular employee connects, field visits, & skip-level meetings to proactively identify concerns.
  • Standardize employee communication and drive awareness of policies and code of conduct.
  • Implement structured grievance redressal mechanisms and ensure timely closure of employee concerns.
  • Drive performance management processes for 3P employees in collaboration with Business teams
    •  
  • Employee Relations & Compliance
  • Manage ER cases related to misconduct, fraud, absenteeism, performance issues,
  • and policy violations.
  • Conduct investigations, maintain documentation, and recommend appropriate
  • disciplinary actions.
    •  
  • Retention & Attrition Management
  • Conduct exit interviews, analyze attrition drivers, & recommend targeted retention strategies.
  • Partner with operations and vendors to address workforce stability & redeployment needs.

• Experience
  • 6–10 years of progressive HR experience, with strong exposure to HRBP / Employee
  • Relations roles.
  • Proven experience managing large blue-collar / contract / 3P workforce across multiple
  • locations.
  • Hands-on experience handling ER cases including misconduct, disciplinary actions, fraud
  • investigations, and grievance management.
  • Strong exposure to labour law compliance, statutory audits, minimum wages, and
  • contractor governance.
  • Experience partnering closely with Operations / Business leaders in a high-volume,
  • field-intensive environment.
  • Prior experience managing or leading a small HR team is preferred.
  • Experience working with staffing vendors and coordinating lifecycle processes including
  • hiring, onboarding, payroll inputs, BGV, and exits.
    •  
  • Education
  • MBA / PGDM in Human Resources or equivalent post-graduate qualification in HR.
  • Graduation in any discipline from a recognized university.
  • Additional certification in Labour Laws, POSH, or Industrial Relations will be an added
  • advantage.
    •  
  • Competencies
  • Strong Employee Relations and conflict resolution capability.
  • High ownership mindset with ability to handle escalations independently.
  • Strong understanding of labour laws and statutory compliance frameworks.
  • Stakeholder management skills with ability to influence operations leaders.
  • Data-driven decision making; ability to track and interpret workforce metrics.
  • Excellent investigation, documentation, and case management skills.
  • Strong communication and field connect capability with blue-collar workforce.
  • Ability to work in ambiguous, fast-paced, and high-pressure environments.
  • Willingness to travel extensively and manage multi-location operations.
  • Team leadership capability with ability to coach and develop direct reports.

descriptionPlain:
About the Team
At Meesho, Talent Acquisition isn’t just about hiring — it’s about shaping the future of internet commerce. Our team sits at the heart of Meesho’s mission to democratize e-commerce for everyone (DICE), building the high-impact teams that make this vision a reality.
We work closely with leaders across Engineering, Product, Data, and Business to bring in exceptional talent at scale — without ever compromising on quality, diversity, or candidate experience. Every hire we make directly influences the speed and ambition with which Meesho grows.
What truly sets us apart is how we’re reimagining recruiting through AI. We are an AI-first talent team, pushing far beyond traditional automation:
We’ve moved from keyword-based screening to intelligent success profiling, powered by deep insights from our hiring and performance data.
We’re building fully automated, high-quality AI-led interview experiences.
Our AI Copilot goes beyond note-taking — it actively elevates interviewer capability and decision-making.
If you’re excited about solving complex hiring challenges, leveraging cutting-edge AI, and building teams that drive massive business impact, you’ll feel right at home here.
About the Role
As a Manager – Tech Recruitment, you will lead and be responsible for end-to-end talent strategy, hiring delivery, and team leadership for the key engineering orgs, while acting as a trusted advisor to business leaders.
This role goes beyond execution—you will help shape the future of hiring at Meesho by driving data-led decision making and AI-powered recruiting initiatives.              
As Meesho continues its rapid growth, the Tech Recruitment team plays a critical role in building for Bharat by hiring the best of talent across backend, frontend, mobile, data, and platform domains. Our engineering efforts are further strengthened by innovations like BharatMLStack — Meesho’s machine learning platform designed to scale AI use cases for India’s diverse and complex user base.

About the Role

As a Manager – Tech Recruitment, you will lead and be responsible for end-to-end talent strategy, hiring delivery, and team leadership for the key engineering orgs, while acting as a trusted advisor to business leaders.

This role goes beyond execution—you will help shape the future of hiring at Meesho by driving data-led decision making and AI-powered recruiting initiatives.              

As Meesho continues its rapid growth, the Tech Recruitment team plays a critical role in building for Bharat by hiring the best of talent across backend, frontend, mobile, data, and platform domains. Our engineering efforts are further strengthened by innovations like BharatMLStack — Meesho’s machine learning platform designed to scale AI use cases for India’s diverse and complex user base.

lists.content:
🔹 Hiring & Delivery

  • Own and deliver end-to-end hiring for tech roles (SDE, Data, ML, Infra, Product)

  • Drive quarterly and annual hiring targets across multiple business units

  • Build strong pipelines for lateral, niche, and leadership hiring

  • Ensure high offer-to-join conversion rates and hiring velocity

    • 🔹 Stakeholder Partnership

  • Partner with Engineering leaders, Hiring Managers, and HRBPs to drive hiring plans

  • Act as a strategic talent advisor with insights on market trends, talent availability, and compensation

  • Influence workforce planning and org design decisions

    • 🔹 Team Leadership

  • Lead, mentor, and scale a team of tech recruiters and sourcers

  • Drive recruiter productivity, ownership, and capability building

  • Establish best practices and playbooks for high-quality tech hiring

    • 🔹 Data & Process Excellence

  • Track and improve key metrics such as:

  • Time to hire

  • Funnel conversion rates

  • Offer acceptance rates

  • Use data to identify bottlenecks and optimize hiring processes

  • Build dashboards and drive data-driven decision making

    • 🔹 AI-First Talent Acquisition

  • Identify opportunities to expand AI and automation across the hiring lifecycle, improving speed, quality, and recruiter productivity

  • Build further 10X on existing AI systems in the areas of talent discovery, enablement, screening, assessment and candidate experience AI-powered sourcing and talent discovery systems to unlock top talent pool

  • Leverage available data and models to drive predictive insights around funnel conversion, candidate drop-offs, and offer acceptance

  • Drive adoption and continuous improvement of AI-enabled workflows within the recruiting team

  • Partner with internal tech/data teams to co-create and scale new AI solutions for Talent Acquisition

  • Bring in external perspective on emerging AI trends in recruiting and translate them into practical, high-impact use cases at Meesho

    • 🔹 Employer Branding & Candidate Experience

  • Strengthen Meesho’s tech employer brand through community engagement, events, and outreach

  • Ensure a seamless and high-quality candidate experience across all touchpoints

• 8+ years of experience in recruiting with a strong focus on tech hiring

  • 2+ years of experience managing and leading recruiting teams

  • Proven track record of hiring for product companies / high-growth startups

  • Strong understanding of engineering roles, tech stacks, and hiring challenges

  • Strong stakeholder management and influencing skills

  • Data-driven mindset with experience in recruiting analytics and metrics

  • Ability to drive hiring at scale while maintaining quality

  • Experience building and mentoring high-performing teams

  • High intent and curiosity to explore, experiment, and adopt AI tools to drive continuous improvement in hiring

  • Hands-on exposure to or strong interest in AI-driven sourcing, screening, or recruiting automation tools

  • Ability to identify opportunities where AI can improve efficiency, quality, or candidate experience

  • Comfort working with data, tools, and systems to optimize recruiting workflows

  • Builder mindset with a bias for innovation, experimentation, and scaling best practice

additionalPlain:
About us 
Welcome to Meesho, where every story begins with a spark of inspiration and a dash of entrepreneurial spirit. We're not just a platform; we're your partner in turning dreams into realities.
Curious about life at Meesho? Explore our Glassdoor - our people have a lot to say and they've helped us become a loved workplace in India.
Our Mission
Democratising internet commerce for everyone — Meesho (Meri Shop) started with a single idea in mind: to be an e-commerce destination for Indian consumers and to enable small businesses to succeed online.
We provide our sellers with benefits such as zero commission and affordable shipping solutions in the market. Today, sellers nationwide are growing their businesses by tapping into Meesho’s large and diverse customer base, state-of-the-art tech infrastructure, and pan-India logistics network through trusted third-party partners.
Affordable, relatable merchandise that mirrors local markets has helped us connect with internet users and serve customers across urban, semi-urban, and rural India. Our unique business model and continuous innovation have established us as a part of India’s e-commerce ecosystem.
Culture and Total Rewards
Our focus is on cultivating a dynamic workplace characterized by high impact and performance excellence. We prioritize a people-centric culture, dedicated to hiring and developing exceptional talent.
Total rewards at Meesho comprise a comprehensive set of elements — monetary, non-monetary, tangible, and intangible. Our 9 guiding principles, or "Mantras," are the backbone of how we operate, influencing everything from recognition and evaluation to growth discussions. Daily rituals and processes like “Problem First Mindset,” “Listen or Die,” our Internal Mobility Program, Talent Reviews, and Continuous Performance Management embody these principles.
We offer competitive compensation — both cash and equity-based — tailored to job roles, individual experience, and skill, along with employee-centric benefits and a supportive work environment. Our holistic wellness program, MeeCare, includes benefits across physical, mental, financial, and social wellness. This includes extensive medical insurance for employees and their families, wellness initiatives like telehealth, wellness events, and fitness-related perks.
To support work-life balance, we offer generous leave policies, parental support, retirement benefits, and learning and development assistance. Through personalized recognition, gratitude for stretched work, and engaging activities, we promote employee delight at the workplace. Additional benefits such as salary advance support, relocation assistance, and flexible benefit plans further enrich the Meesho experience.
At Meesho, we are committed to creating an inclusive and accessible workplace where every individual can thrive. In compliance with the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016, we uphold the following principles:
Equal Opportunity: We ensure that employment opportunities are never denied on the grounds of disability if the candidate is otherwise competent to perform the job.
Accessible Workplace: Our facilities are designed to be fully accessible, with amenities and assistive devices provided to support differently abled individuals in their work.
Inclusive Hiring Process: We adopt a transparent and non-discriminatory selection process, including providing application forms in alternate formats and offering reasonable accommodations during interviews upon request.
Career Growth: We provide adequate training post-recruitment and pre-promotion, with training materials available in accessible formats to enable equal career progression.
Support & Confidentiality: A dedicated liaison officer/committee addresses concerns and grievances, while maintaining strict confidentiality of disability-related information.
Awareness & Inclusion: We conduct awareness programs to promote a culture of inclusivity across the organization.
Meesho welcomes applicants and employees of all abilities and is dedicated to fostering an environment where differently abled persons can achieve their full potential.
Know more about Meesho here : https://www.meesho.io/

descriptionPlain:
About the Team   
It’s no secret that Meesho is making massive leaps towards becoming the most used e-commerce app in India. Our Finance team has a key role to play in the company's success. Here’s your chance to be a part of the Meesho success story!😎
As Manager – Finance Reporting & GL, you'll be a part of a 75+ strong finance team covering domains like Financial Reporting, Finance Operations, Business Finance, Treasury Management, and Taxation. Our team comprises Chartered Accountants, Analysts, and Engineers from top-tier organizations.We believe in a high-performance culture paired with a strong sense of team spirit – from trivia nights to strategy offsites.
About the Role
We are looking for a Manager – Finance to own Books, Audit, Banking, Insurance, and Assets at
Meesho. This role offers the chance to work on high-impact projects and contribute to building financial
processes that complies requirement of a listed company. You’ll ensure accurate reporting, smooth audits,
strong treasury management, and lead critical finance initiatives.
Why Join Us?
At Meesho, you’ll be part of the core IPO journey, shaping financial processes that set new industry
benchmarks. This is your chance to grow with a company that’s redefining how India shops.

lists.content:
• Prepare and ensure timely closure of financial statements (standalone & consolidated) in
    compliance with Ind AS and Indian GAAP, with high accuracy and completeness.
  • Independently evaluate and implement accounting treatment for new business initiatives and
    complex transactions, including appropriate disclosures in financial statements.
  • Execute financial reporting requirements, including audit readiness, documentation, and
    external reporting, aligned with listed company standards.
  •  Manage end-to-end coordination with Big 4 auditors to ensure smooth and timely completion of
    quarterly and annual audits.
  • Own and drive month-end and year-end close processes, including consolidation, with a
    focus on timelines, accuracy, and process improvements.
  • Prepare and support deliverables for quarterly reviews, annual reports, and investor queries,
    ensuring high-quality outputs.
  • Manage treasury operations, including cash flow monitoring, banking coordination, investments
    tracking, and support on hedging execution.
  • Oversee accounting operations (AP, AR, GL, payroll), ensuring accuracy, controls, and
    adherence to timelines.
  • Manage fixed assets and insurance processes, ensuring compliance, tracking, and appropriate
    accounting.
  • Ensure adherence to internal controls, SOPs, and governance frameworks, and proactively
    drive process improvements and standardization.
  • Coordinate with external consultants/advisors to ensure alignment of accounting practices with
    industry standards.
  • Mentor and guide junior team members, ensuring quality and timely delivery of team outputs.

• Chartered Accountant with 4–6 years of post-qualification experience in a listed organization
    handling statutory reporting.
  • Solid knowledge of accounting standards, reporting, and ERP systems.
  • Experience in stakeholder management.
  • Strong execution bias, problem-solving skills, and ability to multitask.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

descriptionBodyPlain:
About the Team   
It’s no secret that Meesho is making massive leaps towards becoming the most used e-commerce app in India. Our Finance team has a key role to play in the company's success. Here’s your chance to be a part of the Meesho success story!😎
As Manager – Finance Reporting & GL, you'll be a part of a 75+ strong finance team covering domains like Financial Reporting, Finance Operations, Business Finance, Treasury Management, and Taxation. Our team comprises Chartered Accountants, Analysts, and Engineers from top-tier organizations.We believe in a high-performance culture paired with a strong sense of team spirit – from trivia nights to strategy offsites.
About the Role
We are looking for a Manager – Finance to own Books, Audit, Banking, Insurance, and Assets at
Meesho. This role offers the chance to work on high-impact projects and contribute to building financial
processes that complies requirement of a listed company. You’ll ensure accurate reporting, smooth audits,
strong treasury management, and lead critical finance initiatives.
Why Join Us?
At Meesho, you’ll be part of the core IPO journey, shaping financial processes that set new industry
benchmarks. This is your chance to grow with a company that’s redefining how India shops.

additionalPlain:
About us 
Welcome to Meesho, where every story begins with a spark of inspiration and a dash of entrepreneurial spirit. We're not just a platform; we're your partner in turning dreams into realities.
Curious about life at Meesho? Explore our Glassdoor - our people have a lot to say and they've helped us become a loved workplace in India.
Our Mission
Democratising internet commerce for everyone — Meesho (Meri Shop) started with a single idea in mind: to be an e-commerce destination for Indian consumers and to enable small businesses to succeed online.
We provide our sellers with benefits such as zero commission and affordable shipping solutions in the market. Today, sellers nationwide are growing their businesses by tapping into Meesho’s large and diverse customer base, state-of-the-art tech infrastructure, and pan-India logistics network through trusted third-party partners.
Affordable, relatable merchandise that mirrors local markets has helped us connect with internet users and serve customers across urban, semi-urban, and rural India. Our unique business model and continuous innovation have established us as a part of India’s e-commerce ecosystem.
Culture and Total Rewards
Our focus is on cultivating a dynamic workplace characterized by high impact and performance excellence. We prioritize a people-centric culture, dedicated to hiring and developing exceptional talent.
Total rewards at Meesho comprise a comprehensive set of elements — monetary, non-monetary, tangible, and intangible. Our 9 guiding principles, or "Mantras," are the backbone of how we operate, influencing everything from recognition and evaluation to growth discussions. Daily rituals and processes like “Problem First Mindset,” “Listen or Die,” our Internal Mobility Program, Talent Reviews, and Continuous Performance Management embody these principles.
We offer competitive compensation — both cash and equity-based — tailored to job roles, individual experience, and skill, along with employee-centric benefits and a supportive work environment. Our holistic wellness program, MeeCare, includes benefits across physical, mental, financial, and social wellness. This includes extensive medical insurance for employees and their families, wellness initiatives like telehealth, wellness events, and fitness-related perks.
To support work-life balance, we offer generous leave policies, parental support, retirement benefits, and learning and development assistance. Through personalized recognition, gratitude for stretched work, and engaging activities, we promote employee delight at the workplace. Additional benefits such as salary advance support, relocation assistance, and flexible benefit plans further enrich the Meesho experience.
At Meesho, we are committed to creating an inclusive and accessible workplace where every individual can thrive. In compliance with the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016, we uphold the following principles:
Equal Opportunity: We ensure that employment opportunities are never denied on the grounds of disability if the candidate is otherwise competent to perform the job.
Accessible Workplace: Our facilities are designed to be fully accessible, with amenities and assistive devices provided to support differently abled individuals in their work.
Inclusive Hiring Process: We adopt a transparent and non-discriminatory selection process, including providing application forms in alternate formats and offering reasonable accommodations during interviews upon request.
Career Growth: We provide adequate training post-recruitment and pre-promotion, with training materials available in accessible formats to enable equal career progression.
Support & Confidentiality: A dedicated liaison officer/committee addresses concerns and grievances, while maintaining strict confidentiality of disability-related information.
Awareness & Inclusion: We conduct awareness programs to promote a culture of inclusivity across the organization.
Meesho welcomes applicants and employees of all abilities and is dedicated to fostering an environment where differently abled persons can achieve their full potential.
Know more about Meesho here : https://www.meesho.io/

descriptionPlain:
About the Team
 
Our Data Science team is the Avengers to Meesho’s S.H.I.E.L.D 🛡️. And why not? We are the ones who assemble during the toughest challenges and devise creative solutions, building intelligent systems for millions of our users looking at a thousand different categories of products. We’ve barely scratched the surface, and have amazing challenges in charting the future of commerce for Bharat.  
 
Our typical day involves dealing with fraud detection, inventory optimisation, and platform vernacularisation.
 
About the Role
 
As a Principal Data Scientist in our AdTech team, you’ll drive innovation in our advertising platform using advanced machine learning and statistical methods. You’ll tackle complex problems in real-time bidding, ad ranking optimization, budget efficiency, and performance measurement that directly impact our business’s bottom line. This role requires technical excellence and business acumen and you’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams to transform data insights into actionable strategies that enhance our advertising ecosystem.
description:
About the Team
 
Our Data Science team is the Avengers to Meesho’s S.H.I.E.L.D 🛡️. And why not? We are the ones who assemble during the toughest challenges and devise creative solutions, building intelligent systems for millions of our users looking at a thousand different categories of products. We’ve barely scratched the surface, and have amazing challenges in charting the future of commerce for Bharat.  
 
Our typical day involves dealing with fraud detection, inventory optimisation, and platform vernacularisation.
 
About the Role
 
As a Principal Data Scientist in our AdTech team, you’ll drive innovation in our advertising platform using advanced machine learning and statistical methods. You’ll tackle complex problems in real-time bidding, ad ranking optimization, budget efficiency, and performance measurement that directly impact our business’s bottom line. This role requires technical excellence and business acumen and you’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams to transform data insights into actionable strategies that enhance our advertising ecosystem.

lists.content:
• Design and develop sophisticated bidding, budget pacing and other algorithms that optimize ad spend or ROI.
  • Create frameworks and experimental design to measure ad effectiveness and ROI.
  • Collaborate with product and engineering teams to translate business requirements into efficient AI/ML solutions.
  • Communicate long-term roadmap, insights and recommendations to tech and business leadership.
  • Mentor junior data scientists and provide technical guidance.
  • Lead research initiatives in machine learning, auction theory and advertising technology.

• B.Tech in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or a related field with at least 6+ years of experience in AI/ML research.
  • Experience in auction theory, predictive modelling, causal inference, and reinforcement learning.
  • Expertise in PyTorch or TensorFlow, and proficiency in Python as well as big data technologies.
  • History of mentoring junior data scientists, and comfortable in driving multiple problem statements.
  • Excellent communication skills, able to explain complex concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
    •  
    Preferred Qualifications:
  • M.Tech or Ph.d in Computer Science with a specialization in Machine Learning.
  • 3+ years of experience applying machine learning and statistical modeling in AdTech, or related domains.
  • Exposure in real-time bidding systems, programmatic advertising, or ad exchanges.
  • Track record of successful research-to-product transitions.
  • Strong publication record in top AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, KDD, CVPR, AAAI).

descriptionPlain:
About the Team

Product Management in Meesho closely resembles our rapacious growth. Because we obsess over understanding customer behaviour, we’ve been able to carve out an e-commerce niche in Tier 2/3/4 towns in Bharat. Our business growth is testimony to a singular focus on how we think of ‘product’ for our unique customers - ones that have barely shopped online, but are now able to because of Meesho.

Fun fact: Nearly 5% of India’s households shop with us. 

As a Product Manager I, in our team, you will collaborate with Developers, other Product Managers, Designers, Data Scientists, and Engineers. We are driven by a ‘user-first’ mindset. We have a strong bias for action. Above all, our PMs are driven by impact, not features. We drive ‘problem discovery’ & delivery - not only obsess over “what to build”, but execute with rigour to create impact.

But there’s more – we love to have fun as much as we love to work hard. From movie buffs to sportspersons, we have a super cool team. So, if a game of badminton after a day of brainstorming at work sounds like something you would love to do, then join us!

About the Role

We are looking for a Product Manager 1 who is passionate about solving high-impact problems in a fast-paced start-up environment with a high degree of autonomy. This is inherently a cross-functional leadership role where you will work closely with teams such as software engineering, UX design, category management, marketing, operations, finance, etc. to bring a new product to life.
description:
About the Team

Product Management in Meesho closely resembles our rapacious growth. Because we obsess over understanding customer behaviour, we’ve been able to carve out an e-commerce niche in Tier 2/3/4 towns in Bharat. Our business growth is testimony to a singular focus on how we think of ‘product’ for our unique customers - ones that have barely shopped online, but are now able to because of Meesho.

Fun fact: Nearly 5% of India’s households shop with us.

As a Product Manager I, in our team, you will collaborate with Developers, other Product Managers, Designers, Data Scientists, and Engineers. We are driven by a ‘user-first’ mindset. We have a strong bias for action. Above all, our PMs are driven by impact, not features. We drive ‘problem discovery’ & delivery - not only obsess over “what to build”, but execute with rigour to create impact.

But there’s more – we love to have fun as much as we love to work hard. From movie buffs to sportspersons, we have a super cool team. So, if a game of badminton after a day of brainstorming at work sounds like something you would love to do, then join us!


About the Role

We are looking for a Product Manager 1 who is passionate about solving high-impact problems in a fast-paced start-up environment with a high degree of autonomy. This is inherently a cross-functional leadership role where you will work closely with teams such as software engineering, UX design, category management, marketing, operations, finance, etc. to bring a new product to life.

lists.content:
• Market & Customer Understanding: Understand the e-commerce market and needs of customers/sellers deeply through landscape analysis, customer interviews, user research, competition analysis and other qualitative/quantitative techniques.

  • Problem Identification & Prioritization: Adopt a structured approach to identify what problems need to be solved and break them down into smaller chunks. Prioritize what problems need to be solved now vs. later.

  • Solution Discovery: Facilitate a process to come up with the best technology-led ideas to solve the prioritized problems. Harness the creativity of not just yourself but of other teams such as design, engineering., business, etc Be willing to experiment with multiple solution ideas and test them using MVPs, prototypes, etc.

  • Product Delivery: Define detailed product requirements and work collaboratively with a cross-functional team (design, engg. business, analytics, etc.) to bring a product to life. Ensure high product quality through processes such as user acceptance testing, dogfooding, etc.

  • Go-to-Market Planning: Create a go-to-market plan working with business/marketing stakeholders to maximize product adoption and success.

  • Adoption & Metrics: Define product metrics for your area, and track them continuously. Identify usage patterns and come up with action plans to move metrics in the right direction.

  • Roadmap Creation: Create a product roadmap for your area that has at least a 3-month forward-looking view of key customer/business problems to be solved.

• Overall experience of 3+ yrs with at least 2+ yrs in product management in a tech-led company (consumer internet space is preferred).

  • Exceptional problem solving skills based on first principles thinking.

  • Good understanding of technology, and comfort with product management processes such as A/B experimentation, writing product requirement documents, managing product backlogs, and creating roadmaps.

  • Good communication and stakeholder management skills to get work done across different functions and drive product development.

Daily rituals and processes like “Problem First Mindset,” “Listen or Die,” our Internal Mobility Program, Talent Reviews, and Continuous Performance Management embody these principles.

We offer competitive compensation — both cash and equity-based — tailored to job roles, individual experience, and skill, along with employee-centric benefits and a supportive work environment. Our holistic wellness program, MeeCare, includes benefits across physical, mental, financial, and social wellness. This includes extensive medical insurance for employees and their families, wellness initiatives like telehealth, wellness events, and fitness-related perks.

To support work-life balance, we offer generous leave policies, parental support, retirement benefits, and learning and development assistance. Through personalized recognition, gratitude for stretched work, and engaging activities, we promote employee delight at the workplace. Additional benefits such as salary advance support, relocation assistance, and flexible benefit plans further enrich the Meesho experience.

At Meesho, we are committed to creating an inclusive and accessible workplace where every individual can thrive. In compliance with the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016, we uphold the following principles:

  • Equal Opportunity: We ensure that employment opportunities are never denied on the grounds of disability if the candidate is otherwise competent to perform the job.

  • Accessible Workplace: Our facilities are designed to be fully accessible, with amenities and assistive devices provided to support differently abled individuals in their work.

  • Inclusive Hiring Process: We adopt a transparent and non-discriminatory selection process, including providing application forms in alternate formats and offering reasonable accommodations during interviews upon request.

  • Career Growth: We provide adequate training post-recruitment and pre-promotion, with training materials available in accessible formats to enable equal career progression.

  • Support & Confidentiality: A dedicated liaison officer/committee addresses concerns and grievances, while maintaining strict confidentiality of disability-related information.

  • Awareness & Inclusion: We conduct awareness programs to promote a culture of inclusivity across the organization.

Meesho welcomes applicants and employees of all abilities and is dedicated to fostering an environment where differently abled persons can achieve their full potential.

Know more about Meesho here : https://www.meesho.io/
descriptionPlain:
About the Team 
 
Product Management in Meesho closely resembles our rocketship growth. Because we obsess over understanding customer behaviour, we’ve been able to carve out an e-commerce niche in Tier 2/3/4 towns in Bharat. Our business growth is testimony to a singular focus on how we think of ‘product’ for our unique customers - ones that have barely shopped online, but are now able to because of Meesho.
 
Fun fact: Nearly 7% of India’s households shop with us. 😉
 
We are driven by a ‘user-first’ mindset. We have a strong bias for action. Above all, our team is driven by impact, not features. We drive ‘problem discovery’ & delivery - not only obsess over “what to build”, but execute with rigour to create impact.
 
But there’s more – we love to have fun as much as we love to work hard. From movie buffs to sportspersons, we have a super cool team. So, if a game of badminton after a day of brainstorming at work sounds like something you would love to do, then join us!
 
About the Role
 
We are looking for a Product Manager 2 who is passionate about solving high-impact problems in a fast-paced start-up environment with a high degree of autonomy. This is inherently a cross-functional leadership role where you will work closely with teams such as software engineering, UX design, category management, marketing, operations, finance, etc. to bring a new product to life.

About the Team 
 
Product Management in Meesho closely resembles our rocketship growth. Because we obsess over understanding customer behaviour, we’ve been able to carve out an e-commerce niche in Tier 2/3/4 towns in Bharat. Our business growth is testimony to a singular focus on how we think of ‘product’ for our unique customers - ones that have barely shopped online, but are now able to because of Meesho.
 
Fun fact: Nearly 7% of India’s households shop with us. 😉
 
We are driven by a ‘user-first’ mindset. We have a strong bias for action. Above all, our team is driven by impact, not features. We drive ‘problem discovery’ & delivery - not only obsess over “what to build”, but execute with rigour to create impact.
 
But there’s more – we love to have fun as much as we love to work hard. From movie buffs to sportspersons, we have a super cool team. So, if a game of badminton after a day of brainstorming at work sounds like something you would love to do, then join us!
 
About the Role
 
We are looking for a Product Manager 2 who is passionate about solving high-impact problems in a fast-paced start-up environment with a high degree of autonomy. This is inherently a cross-functional leadership role where you will work closely with teams such as software engineering, UX design, category management, marketing, operations, finance, etc. to bring a new product to life.

lists.content:
• Market & Customer Understanding: Understand the e-commerce market and needs of customers/sellers deeply through landscape analysis, customer interviews, user research, competition analysis and other qualitative/quantitative techniques.
  • Problem Identification & Prioritization: Adopt a structured approach to identify what problems need to be solved and break them down into smaller chunks. Prioritize what problems need to be solved now vs. later.
  • Solution Discovery: Facilitate a process to come up with the best technology-led ideas to solve the prioritised problems. Harness the creativity of not just yourself but of other teams such as design, engineering., business, etc Be willing to experiment with multiple solution ideas and test them using MVPs, prototypes, etc.
  • Product Delivery: Define detailed product requirements and work collaboratively with a cross-functional team (design, engg. business, analytics, etc.) to bring a product to life. Ensure high product quality through processes such as user acceptance testing, dogfooding, etc.
  • Go-to-Market Planning: Create a go-to-market plan working with business/marketing stakeholders to maximize product adoption and success.
  • Adoption & Metrics: Define product metrics for your area, and track them continuously. Identify usage patterns and come up with action plans to move metrics in the right direction.
  • Roadmap Creation: Create a product roadmap for your area that has at least a 3-month forward-looking view of key customer/business problems to be solved.

• Overall experience of 4+ yrs with at least 4+ yrs in product management in a tech-led company (consumer internet space is preferred)
  • Exceptional problem-solving skills based on first principles of thinking
  • Good understanding of technology, and comfort with product management processes such as A/B experimentation, writing product requirement documents, managing product backlogs, and creating roadmaps
  • Good communication and stakeholder management skills to get work done across different functions and drive product development

About us 
Welcome to Meesho, where every story begins with a spark of inspiration and a dash of entrepreneurial spirit. We're not just a platform; we're your partner in turning dreams into realities.
Curious about life at Meesho? Explore our Glassdoor - our people have a lot to say and they've helped us become a loved workplace in India.
Our Mission
Democratising internet commerce for everyone — Meesho (Meri Shop) started with a single idea in mind: to be an e-commerce destination for Indian consumers and to enable small businesses to succeed online.
We provide our sellers with benefits such as zero commission and affordable shipping solutions in the market. Today, sellers nationwide are growing their businesses by tapping into Meesho’s large and diverse customer base, state-of-the-art tech infrastructure, and pan-India logistics network through trusted third-party partners.
Affordable, relatable merchandise that mirrors local markets has helped us connect with internet users and serve customers across urban, semi-urban, and rural India. Our unique business model and continuous innovation have established us as a part of India’s e-commerce ecosystem.

descriptionPlain:
About the Team

Would you like to be part of creating a unicorn within a unicorn? Solve some of the biggest challenges facing the financial inclusion of Bharat? Well, then here’s your chance! Financial Services (FS) is one of the biggest new bets we are taking at Meesho on the next 10x horizon opportunity for us. You’ve heard Vidit talking about financial services and how bullish our leadership team is. Our vision is to build financial services for Meesho, becoming our key growth and revenue driver. And you will be at the center of this journey, building and scaling the user lending business and serving millions of Meesho users.
 

About the Role

You will play a vital role in scaling up existing and building new credit products for Meesho users. You will get to wear multiple hats such as problem solving, strategy, growth and execution. You will also work closely with other cross functional teams such as Credit Risk, Product, Technology, User growth and our lending partners. As the Financial Services team, we always look at the bottom line !! And the bottom line is – in this team, you should expect to have fun as you learn and grow.
description:
About the Team


Would you like to be part of creating a unicorn within a unicorn? Solve some of the biggest challenges facing the financial inclusion of Bharat? Well, then here’s your chance! Financial Services (FS) is one of the biggest new bets we are taking at Meesho on the next 10x horizon opportunity for us. You’ve heard Vidit talking about financial services and how bullish our leadership team is. Our vision is to build financial services for Meesho, becoming our key growth and revenue driver. And you will be at the center of this journey, building and scaling the user lending business and serving millions of Meesho users.
 


About the Role


You will play a vital role in scaling up existing and building new credit products for Meesho users. You will get to wear multiple hats such as problem solving, strategy, growth and execution. You will also work closely with other cross functional teams such as Credit Risk, Product, Technology, User growth and our lending partners. As the Financial Services team, we always look at the bottom line !! And the bottom line is – in this team, you should expect to have fun as you learn and grow.

lists.content:
• Growth and Marketing: Drive adoption of credit products with Meesho users. Work with user growth and Meesho app teams to identify app properties, create campaigns, send communications to generate traffic You will carry targets on adoption
  • Conversion funnel: Measure CTAs and conversion, identify product and operational levers to improve conversions. Work with partners and product team to implement the key initiatives and improve conversion. Benchmark journeys with other fintech players.
  • Utilization: Increase spends from existing users by nudging them to use credit products for their day to day spends and improve utilization
  • Campaign execution: Design and implement adoption and utilization campaigns. Prepare budget requirements for the same
  • Data Visibility: Work with business analysts to create dashboards for adoption and utilization. Create customer cohorts to design segment wise strategies
  • Stakeholder Management: Collaborate with external stakeholders - agencies, and lender partners - and internal stakeholders - business, product, risk, and tech teams
  • Executive communication: Write exec-level documents and present results and findings to senior management

• 2-5 years of work experience in driving user growth, experience of financial products (preferably user loans)
  • Execution experience, demonstrated examples of delivering high impact projects 
  • Strong growth mindset and an inquisitive mindset, continuous problem solving to improve and grow the business
  • Proficiency in MS Excel including creating dashboards, and reports. Appreciation for digital/analytics led product development, targeting end-to-end automation of loan journeys
  • Ability to independently drive problem statements and impact. Understand customer’s needs and come up with right pitch and communication strategies
  • First principles based critical thinking and data-led approach to problem-solving
  • Strong stakeholder management and communication skillsAbility to work in a VUCA environment

descriptionPlain:
About the Team
 
The Meesho AI Services team is dedicated to revolutionizing customer support through cutting-edge AI technologies like chatbots, voicebots, and predictive analytics. We will partner with call centers and BPOs to deliver seamless, efficient, and customer-focused operations. In addition to driving technology and process excellence, we actively manage client and partner relationships to ensure alignment on goals and continuous improvement. If you’re passionate about AI, building strong partnerships, and creating impactful change, this is the team for you!
 
About the Role
 
As a Manager, you will play a critical role in solving business critical problems. You’ll identify key opportunity areas through primary and secondary research, find user & seller problems, set priorities, come up with solutions and drive implementation in different types of projects.
 
You’ll shape up the right solutions in coordination with the product team (in case your solution requires tech interventions). You’ll also work with the team leaders to create and improve the operating systems of the team (strategic planning, competitive intelligence, building review systems, culture and so on).

The Meesho AI Services team is dedicated to revolutionizing customer support through cutting-edge AI technologies like chatbots, voicebots, and predictive analytics. We will partner with call centers and BPOs to deliver seamless, efficient, and customer-focused operations. In addition to driving technology and process excellence, we actively manage client and partner relationships to ensure alignment on goals and continuous improvement. If you’re passionate about AI, building strong partnerships, and creating impactful change, this is the team for you!
 
About the Role
 
As a Manager, you will play a critical role in solving business critical problems. You’ll identify key opportunity areas through primary and secondary research, find user & seller problems, set priorities, come up with solutions and drive implementation in different types of projects.
 
You’ll shape up the right solutions in coordination with the product team (in case your solution requires tech interventions). You’ll also work with the team leaders to create and improve the operating systems of the team (strategic planning, competitive intelligence, building review systems, culture and so on).

lists.content:
• In-depth primary and secondary research into different consumption verticals of India, which will also require you to go on the ground talk to users and any other stakeholders of the industry
  • Build experimenting strategy for different products to test and launch in the vertical
  • Set the goal metrics for Product-Market-Fit and enable the execution teams to reach those metrics for PMF
  • Lead in problem-solving tasks and discussions to unlock product-market-fit
  • Own the end of end goal and execution ownership of your charters
  • Play a key role in framing strategic documents(working sessions) for problem discovery, exploration and solutions
  • Create and structure monthly review documents to be presented to the senior management / CEO
  • Create and maintain systems and processes to streamline operations across the business team
  • Be fungible in the role to potentially lead an execution charter along with the strategy role for the new Vertical

•  3-5 years of total work experience. At least 2+ year of experience in consulting ﬁrms / strategy offices of tech startups. Experience in startups/tech companies in similar roles will be an advantage
  • Proven problem-solving, project management skills and ability to derive core user insights from different types of users (consumers, sellers etc.)
  • You have championed teams through transformational changes, driven technological innovations, and improved operational performance in a customer support environment.
  • Proven leadership and organizational skills in your work experience

In addition to driving technology and process excellence, we actively manage client and partner relationships to ensure alignment on goals and continuous improvement. If you’re passionate about AI, building strong partnerships, and creating impactful change, this is the team for you!
 
About the Role
 
As a Manager, you will play a critical role in solving business critical problems. You’ll identify key opportunity areas through primary and secondary research, find user & seller problems, set priorities, come up with solutions and drive implementation in different types of projects.
 
You’ll shape up the right solutions in coordination with the product team (in case your solution requires tech interventions). You’ll also work with the team leaders to create and improve the operating systems of the team (strategic planning, competitive intelligence, building review systems, culture and so on).

additionalPlain:
About us 
Welcome to Meesho, where every story begins with a spark of inspiration and a dash of entrepreneurial spirit. We're not just a platform; we're your partner in turning dreams into realities.
Curious about life at Meesho? Explore our Glassdoor - our people have a lot to say and they've helped us become a loved workplace in India.
Our Mission
Democratising internet commerce for everyone — Meesho (Meri Shop) started with a single idea in mind: to be an e-commerce destination for Indian consumers and to enable small businesses to succeed online.
We provide our sellers with benefits such as zero commission and affordable shipping solutions in the market. Today, sellers nationwide are growing their businesses by tapping into Meesho’s large and diverse customer base, state-of-the-art tech infrastructure, and pan-India logistics network through trusted third-party partners.
Affordable, relatable merchandise that mirrors local markets has helped us connect with internet users and serve customers across urban, semi-urban, and rural India. Our unique business model and continuous innovation have established us as a part of India’s e-commerce ecosystem.
Culture and Total Rewards
Our focus is on cultivating a dynamic workplace characterized by high impact and performance excellence. We prioritize a people-centric culture, dedicated to hiring and developing exceptional talent.
Total rewards at Meesho comprise a comprehensive set of elements — monetary, non-monetary, tangible, and intangible. Our 9 guiding principles, or "Mantras," are the backbone of how we operate, influencing everything from recognition and evaluation to growth discussions. Daily rituals and processes like “Problem First Mindset,” “Listen or Die,” our Internal Mobility Program, Talent Reviews, and Continuous Performance Management embody these principles.
We offer competitive compensation — both cash and equity-based — tailored to job roles, individual experience, and skill, along with employee-centric benefits and a supportive work environment. Our holistic wellness program, MeeCare, includes benefits across physical, mental, financial, and social wellness. This includes extensive medical insurance for employees and their families, wellness initiatives like telehealth, wellness events, and fitness-related perks.
To support work-life balance, we offer generous leave policies, parental support, retirement benefits, and learning and development assistance. Through personalized recognition, gratitude for stretched work, and engaging activities, we promote employee delight at the workplace. Additional benefits such as salary advance support, relocation assistance, and flexible benefit plans further enrich the Meesho experience.
At Meesho, we are committed to creating an inclusive and accessible workplace where every individual can thrive. In compliance with the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016, we uphold the following principles:
Equal Opportunity: We ensure that employment opportunities are never denied on the grounds of disability if the candidate is otherwise competent to perform the job.
Accessible Workplace: Our facilities are designed to be fully accessible, with amenities and assistive devices provided to support differently abled individuals in their work.
Inclusive Hiring Process: We adopt a transparent and non-discriminatory selection process, including providing application forms in alternate formats and offering reasonable accommodations during interviews upon request.
Career Growth: We provide adequate training post-recruitment and pre-promotion, with training materials available in accessible formats to enable equal career progression.
Support & Confidentiality: A dedicated liaison officer/committee addresses concerns and grievances, while maintaining strict confidentiality of disability-related information.
Awareness & Inclusion: We conduct awareness programs to promote a culture of inclusivity across the organization.
Meesho welcomes applicants and employees of all abilities and is dedicated to fostering an environment where differently abled persons can achieve their full potential.
Know more about Meesho here : https://www.meesho.io/

descriptionPlain:
About the Team
 
The security team at Meesho is like the Avengers to Meesho's S.H.I.E.L.D. After all, when 5% of Indian households shop with us, it’s important to build resilient systems to manage millions of orders every day. We’ve done this – with zero downtime! 😎 Sounds impossible? Well, that’s the kind of Engineering muscle that has helped Meesho become the e-commerce giant it is today. We value speed over perfection, and see failures as opportunities to become better. We’ve taken steps to inculcate a strong ‘Founder’s Mindset’ across our engineering teams, making us grow and move fast. We place special emphasis on the continuous growth of each team member - and we do this with regular 1-1s and open communication. As a Security Engineer, you will be part of self-starters who thrive on teamwork and constructive feedback. We know how to party as hard as we work! If we aren’t building unparalleled tech solutions, you can find us debating the plot points of our favorite books and games – or even gossiping over chai. So, if a day filled with building impactful solutions with a fun team sounds appealing to you, join us.
 
About the Role
 
As a Security Engineer 4, your role is integral in ensuring the security of our products throughout their development lifecycle. You will be involved from the very beginning, participating in threat modeling and design reviews to identify potential risks early. You'll also integrate and manage SAST tools within our CI/CD pipeline, ensuring continuous security testing as code evolves. Additionally, you'll lead and conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration testing (VAPT) to proactively uncover and address security vulnerabilities before they reach production.
